title: Define Chronik high-value operator events
goal: Define and enforce the small event set whose historical value exceeds existing Git, Bureau receipt and source-log coverage.

acceptance.assertion: Every retained operator event has a named query, consumer or recovery use that is not already satisfied by Git, Bureau receipts or source logs.
A bounded allowlist covers lifecycle, deployment, failure, policy-block and recovery events; commits, diffs and routine task transitions are excluded.
Retention, redaction and provenance are explicit and tested.
At least one real consumer can query the retained events without granting Chronik task or command authority.
